title: musaceae
intro: The musaceae rank, also known as the banana family, refers to a family of plants within the monocots. It is characterized by large, herbaceous plants that produce edible fruits, with the most well-known member being the banana (Musa acuminata). Members of the musaceae family are primarily native to Southeast Asia but have been widely cultivated and naturalized in other tropical regions around the world. This family consists of approximately 65-70 species, many of which are commonly consumed as food.
